Container.Name: TradingAgents
Container.Overview:
TradingAgents is a multi-agent LLM financial trading framework. It uses specialized AI agents (analysts, traders, portfolio managers, researchers, and risk managers) to collaborate on trading decisions for stocks.
Usage (open Unraid container console): tradingagents analyze --ticker NVDA tradingagents analyze -t NVDA -d 2024-05-10 --depth 3 tradingagents analyze -t NVDA -p openai-compatible --backend-url http://host:8080/v1 --deep-model x --quick-model y
Without --ticker, runs in interactive mode.
At least one LLM provider API key is required (set via environment variables).
Data and logs are persisted in /home/appuser/.tradingagents inside the container.
GitHub: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
Container.Requires: Before first deployment, run the following in the Unraid terminal:brbrmkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/tradingagentsbrchown -R 1000:1000 /mnt/user/appdata/tradingagents

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for TradingAgents cache, logs, and decision history.

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI (GPT models). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: API key for Anthropic (Claude models). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: Google API Key
Config.Description: API key for Google (Gemini models). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: XAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for xAI (Grok models). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: DeepSeek API Key
Config.Description: API key for DeepSeek models. Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: DashScope API Key
Config.Description: API key for Alibaba DashScope (Qwen models). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: ZhiPu API Key
Config.Description: API key for ZhiPu AI (GLM models). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenRouter (multi-model gateway). Optional if using another provider.

Config.Name: Alpha Vantage API Key
Config.Description: API key for Alpha Vantage market data. Optional - yfinance is used by default.

Config.Name: Default LLM Provider
Config.Description: Default LLM provider for non-interactive mode. Options: openai, anthropic, google, xai, deepseek, qwen, glm, openrouter, ollama, openai-compatible.

Config.Name: OpenAI-Compatible Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. http://host:8080/v1). Used with the OpenAI-Compatible provider.

Config.Name: Quick Think Model
Config.Description: Model ID for quick-thinking agent (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, qwen-turbo). Used with OpenAI-Compatible provider.

Config.Name: Deep Think Model
Config.Description: Model ID for deep-thinking agent (e.g. gpt-4o, qwen-plus). Used with OpenAI-Compatible provider.
